NASA GISTEMP v4 Global Land-Ocean Temperature Index.

Global temperature anomaly data for the 2010s decade.
NASA GISTEMP v4 Global Land-Ocean Temperature Index.
This is global surface temperature anomaly data relative to the 1951-1980 baseline period.
This is one of the warmest decades on record globally. This decade ranks among the hottest in recorded history.
Decade: 2010s | Period: 2010-2019
Average annual global anomaly: 0.806°C
Range: 0.610°C to 1.010°C
